artifact_families.name: release_files
artifact_families.description: Release-scoped generic artifact uploads such as source maps, ProGuard mappings, and artifact bundles.

artifact_families.name: debug_files
artifact_families.description: Release-scoped native debug files, symbol sources, and native reprocess inputs.

artifact_families.name: replay_assets
artifact_families.description: Replay manifests, playback assets, and pane-aware timeline items.

artifact_families.name: profile_payloads
artifact_families.description: Canonical profile manifests plus normalized thread, frame, stack, and sample graphs.

artifact_families.name: preprod_artifacts
artifact_families.description: Pre-production mobile build artifacts and install-detail metadata.

artifact_families.name: import_export_blobs
artifact_families.description: Organization import and export bundles with artifact bodies and checksum manifests.
